article.title: Suno is shutting down its current AI models. Here's what actually changes.
article.summary: Suno settled with Warner Music Group in November and agreed to retire all existing models trained on unlicensed music. New licensed models replace them in 2026. When they launch, the old ones are gone permanently. For users this means: free tier loses download access entirely. Paid tier gets monthly

caption:
BREAKING: Suno is shutting down its current AI models. Here's what actually changes.

Suno settled with Warner Music Group in November and agreed to retire all existing models trained on unlicensed music. New licensed models replace them in 2026. When they launch, the old ones are gone permanently. For users this means: free tier loses download access entirely. Pa
